title: Nexus TimelinePatchEventRequest
description: Request body for POST /v1/local/works/{work_id}/timeline/patch (V1.72). Mutates the Work timeline: add, remove, attach to chapter, or create foreshadow links.

work_id.description: Work identifier from the URL path. Must match the path parameter.

base_revision.description: Revision observed by the client on the last canonical read.

event_id.description: Identifier of an existing event (required for remove_event, attach_event_to_chapter, link_foreshadow).

title.description: Human-facing title for a new event (add_event).

description.description: Optional longer description for a new event (add_event).

realizes_chapter_id.description: Chapter number that the event realizes (add_event, attach_event_to_chapter).

target_chapter_id.description: Chapter number that the event attaches to (attach_event_to_chapter).

foreshadows_event_id.description: Event identifier that the source event foreshadows (link_foreshadow).
